name: Kagero the Cannon Ninja
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>銃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つつがね</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>忍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>火光</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カゲロウ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is Normal Summoned, Special Summoned, or flipped face-up: You can Special Summon 1 "Ninja" monster from your hand or GY in face-down Defense Position, except "Kagero the Cannon Ninja". When your opponent activates a card or effect that targets exactly 1 "Ninja" card or exactly 1 face-down Defense Position monster you control, while this card is in your GY (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card in face-down Defense Position, and if you do, return that targeted card to the hand. You can only use each effect of "Kagero the Cannon Ninja" once per turn.

You can only use each effect of "Kagero the Cannon Ninja" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Activates if targeted by card effect
Returns from your field to your hand
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
